patch.insert_text: - Ferrous sulfate 325 mg orally once daily; take with vitamin C (orange juice), avoid coffee, tea, and milk.
added_claims: Ferrous sulfate 325 mg orally once daily started

reasons: All three claims (ferrous sulfate 325 mg once daily, take with vitamin C/orange juice, avoid coffee/tea/milk) are directly supported by the transcript span.
The note's Anemia section only mentions a Vitamin B12 injection; oral ferrous sulfate and its administration instructions are new, non-duplicative content.
An iron supplement for the newly identified anemia belongs in Assessment and Plan; appending is appropriate.

Content is new; note only mentions B12 injection for anemia, not oral iron — non-redundant.
Iron therapy belongs in Assessment and Plan (Anemia section), so placement is appropriate.
